why_to_review: Extra support could hold learners back in some contexts if it is excessive.
suggested_review_focus: Check whether the mismatch is clear enough.

why_to_review: A heavy chair came along may sound odd because the subject is inanimate.
suggested_review_focus: Check whether it is a useful semantic mismatch or too easy.

why_to_review: An ordinary answer could still stand out if other answers are worse.
suggested_review_focus: Check whether ordinary conflicts strongly enough with best answer.

why_to_review: Making out the silence is semantically odd and may be too easy.
suggested_review_focus: Check whether a less extreme auditory/visual mismatch is preferable.

why_to_review: Cutting someone off before speaking may mean preventing them from speaking.
suggested_review_focus: Check whether this still counts as an interruption sense.
Check whether the mismatch targets the PV rather than general sentence anomaly.

why_to_review: Looking out at the silence is very unnatural.
suggested_review_focus: Check whether the item is too easy.

why_to_review: The sentence could be read sarcastically.
suggested_review_focus: Check whether discourse meaning is clear in audio.

why_to_review: Came in may be interpreted physically rather than as becoming involved.
suggested_review_focus: Check whether the target sense is controlled.

why_to_review: No effect at all clearly contradicts brought about, but may be too explicit.
suggested_review_focus: Check whether contradiction is acceptable for LJT.

why_to_review: Following up with a cloud is very unnatural.
suggested_review_focus: Check whether a more plausible wrong follow-up object is needed.

why_to_review: Lay out the soup could be possible in a physical arrangement sense.
suggested_review_focus: Check whether introduction as subject blocks the literal interpretation.
